visual_dna.world: environments that defy physics — reversed causality, impossible scale, dreamscape logic, events out of sequence
visual_dna.camera_system: Phantom Flex 4K at extreme frame rates, perspective geometry deliberately broken
visual_dna.film: Fuji Superia 800 pushed — colour shifts during motion, temporal colour temperature drift, blur as intent

visual_dna.lighting_secondary: shadow without source, light without origin — physically incorrect but emotionally right
visual_dna.motion_character: time dilation — events appear slow-motion, gravity optional, camera defies physical space

visual_dna.full_anchor: [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] emotional register + colour temperature + temporal distortion level consistency. Fuji Superia 800 pushed — colour shifts during motion, temporal colour temperature drift, blur as intent. Temporal consistency across all clips.

shot_list.intent: Stop the scroll. Establish tension before explanation.
shot_list.prompt: Shot 1 (0–5s): Aesthetic: Surreal Temporal. environments that defy physics — reversed causality, impossible scale, dreamscape logic, events out of sequence. Empty office desk. Untouched ISA paperwork sits under a paperweight. A phone screen lights up — notification unseen. Camera: Phantom Flex 4K at extreme frame rates, perspective geometry deliberately broken. Motion: time dilation — events appear slow-motion, gravity optional, camera defies physical space. Lighting: golden hour frozen in time — light that doesn't change as camera moves. shadow without source, light without origin — physically incorrect but emotionally right. Film stock: Fuji Superia 800 pushed — colour shifts during motion, temporal colour temperature drift, blur as intent. Atmosphere: at 3-second mark, distant city light shifts slightly as cloud passes, barely perceptible ambient change. [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] emotional register + colour temperature + temporal distortion level consistency. Fuji Superia 800 pushed — colour shifts during motion, temporal colour temperature drift, blur as intent. Temporal consistency across all clips. Avoid: watermarks, text overlays, subtitle artifacts, camera jitter, morphing surfaces, flickering light, inconsistent shadows. Also avoid: normal time perception, consistent physics, conventional camera logic, photorealistic accuracy, static objects.
shot_list.negative_prompt: blur, distortion, watermark, text overlay, low quality, compression artifacts, flickering, inconsistent lighting, morphing faces, morphing textures, oversaturation, plastic skin, smooth waxy texture, artificial bokeh halos, readable account numbers, readable financial data, screen moiré, normal time perception, consistent physics, conventional camera logic, photorealistic accuracy, static objects
